title.zh: TSMC 6 月收入 NT$442.68B，Q2 按官方指引汇率折算落在区间内
title.en: TSMC posts NT$442.68B June revenue, with Q2 landing within guidance at the official planning FX rate

detail.zh: TSMC 2026-07-13 提交的 SEC 6-K 显示，6 月收入 NT$442.68B（同比 +67.9%），Jan-Jun 合计 NT$2,404.48B（同比 +35.6%）；据月度收入相加，Q2 约 NT$1.270T，按公司 Q1 财报给出的 31.7 NT$/US$ 规划汇率折算约 US$40.1B，落在 US$39.0-40.2B 指引区间内，并非超指引。该读数确认 foundry 收入仍处强劲轨迹，但不能单独证明先进节点利用率、CoWoS 排产或客户结构；这些项目及毛利率需等待 2026-07-16 的完整 Q2 财报。
detail.en: TSMC's SEC 6-K filed on 2026-07-13 reports June revenue of NT$442.68B (+67.9% YoY) and Jan-Jun revenue of NT$2,404.48B (+35.6%). Summing the monthly figures gives roughly NT$1.270T for Q2, or about US$40.1B at the NT$31.7/US$ planning rate in the company's Q1 release—within the US$39.0-40.2B guidance range, not above it. The reading confirms a strong foundry revenue trajectory, but by itself does not establish advanced-node utilization, CoWoS bookings, or customer mix; those items and margins await the full Q2 release on 2026-07-16.

title.zh: Micron 扩大美国供应链承诺，SK hynix 以 ADS 融资支持韩国 fab 与 EUV
title.en: Micron expands U.S. supply-chain commitments as SK hynix funds Korean fabs and EUV through an ADS offering

detail.zh: Micron 2026-07-09 官方公告最多投入 $3B 强化美国半导体供应链，其中拟向 GlobalWafers 提供 $500M 融资并签订 10 年 300mm 原始硅片供应协议；融资与协议仍以最终文件、监管批准等条件为前提。Micron 同期在纽约 fab 浇筑首块混凝土，并重申到 2035 年在美国投入超过 $250B 的计划。SK hynix 2026-07-10 最终 SEC 424B4 则确认以每 ADS $149 发行 177.9M 份 ADS、预计净募资约 $26.2B，拟在 2027 年 12 月前用于韩国生产设施及 EUV 扫描仪。两项资本动作强化 memory 供给响应证据，但尚不等于新增 bit supply 已经上线。
detail.en: Micron's official 2026-07-09 release announced up to $3B to strengthen the U.S. semiconductor supply chain, including proposed $500M financing for GlobalWafers and a 10-year 300mm raw-wafer supply agreement; the financing and agreement remain subject to definitive documents, regulatory approvals, and other conditions. Micron separately poured first concrete at its New York fab and reiterated plans to invest more than $250B in the United States through 2035. SK hynix's final SEC 424B4 dated 2026-07-10 confirms 177.9M ADSs at $149 each and estimated net proceeds of about $26.2B, intended for Korean production facilities and EUV scanners through December 2027. The two capital actions strengthen evidence of a memory supply response, but do not mean incremental bit supply is already online.

title.zh: 三星 Q2 初步营业利润约 ₩89.4T，分部归因待正式财报
title.en: Samsung guides to about KRW 89.4T of preliminary Q2 operating profit, with segment attribution still pending

detail.zh: 三星电子 2026-07-07 官方初步业绩指引给出 Q2 合并销售额约 ₩171T、营业利润约 ₩89.4T。该公告只提供合并预估，尚无 memory、foundry、mobile 等分部拆分，因此在 2026-07-30 正式业绩发布前，不把利润跳升直接归因于 AI memory/HBM。它作为 memory-cycle 的预警读数：若正式分部数据确认 memory 价格与利润率同步走高，将加强周期高景气信号；若利润来自其他分部，则需下调其对 memory 论点的权重。
detail.en: Samsung Electronics' official preliminary earnings guidance on 2026-07-07 puts consolidated Q2 sales at about KRW 171T and operating profit at about KRW 89.4T. The release provides only consolidated estimates, with no split for memory, foundry, mobile, or other segments, so the profit increase is not attributed directly to AI memory or HBM before the full results on 2026-07-30. It is an early memory-cycle reading: confirmation that memory pricing and margins rose together would strengthen the high-cycle signal, while profit concentrated elsewhere would reduce its weight in the memory thesis.

title.zh: ASML/AMAT/LRCX/KLAC/SNPS/CDNS 补齐 AI capex 的设备与 EDA 确认层
title.en: ASML/AMAT/LRCX/KLAC/SNPS/CDNS complete the equipment and EDA confirmation layer for AI capex

detail.zh: P2 新增六个上游确认点：ASML Q4 2025 net bookings EUR 13.158B（EUV EUR 7.4B）和 backlog EUR 38.797B；AMAT Q2 FY2026 revenue $7.91B 且 Q3 指引 $8.95B；LRCX March quarter revenue $5.841B 且 June guide $6.60B；KLAC Q3 Semiconductor Process Control revenue $3.084B；SNPS FY2026 revenue 指引 $9.625-9.705B（含 Ansys）；CDNS backlog $8.0B、next-12-month RPO revenue $4.0B。这个信号用来验证 AI 资本开支是否从芯片/云/数据中心叙事进入工具订单、良率控制、EDA/IP 与设计复杂度；若这些读数降温，上游 capex 可能只是预算或公告，而非已承诺可制造供给。
detail.en: P2 adds six upstream confirmation points: ASML Q4 2025 net bookings of EUR 13.158B (EUR 7.4B EUV) and EUR 38.797B backlog; AMAT Q2 FY2026 revenue of $7.91B and Q3 guidance of $8.95B; LRCX March-quarter revenue of $5.841B and June-quarter guide of $6.60B; KLAC Q3 Semiconductor Process Control revenue of $3.084B; SNPS FY2026 revenue guidance of $9.625-9.705B including Ansys; and CDNS backlog of $8.0B with $4.0B next-12-month RPO revenue. This signal tests whether AI capex has moved from chip/cloud/data-center narrative into tool orders, yield control, EDA/IP, and design complexity; if these readings cool, upstream capex may be budgeted or announced rather than committed manufacturable supply.

title.zh: Meta 筹建云业务，外售过剩 AI 算力
title.en: Meta building a cloud business to sell excess AI compute

detail.zh: 彭博 7 月 1 日报道 Meta 正筹建云业务、对外出售过剩 AI 算力，META 当日涨逾 6%；同日 AI 基建链大面积下跌：MU 跌逾 10%，SNDK/INTC/AMD 跌 6.9%–10.6%，CRWV 跌约 14%，NBIS 跌约 17%；7 月 2 日 SK 海力士领跌韩股。市场首次对「算力供给持续紧张」假设定价出裂缝。
detail.en: Bloomberg reported on Jul 1 that Meta is building a cloud business to sell excess AI compute; META rose 6%+ while the AI-infra chain sold off broadly: MU down 10%+, SNDK/INTC/AMD down 6.9%-10.6%, CRWV down ~14%, NBIS down ~17%; SK hynix led Korean declines on Jul 2. First market-wide crack priced into the compute-scarcity assumption.

title.zh: TSMC Jan-May 收入 +30%，先进制程与封装继续定义 AI 供给上限
title.en: TSMC Jan-May revenue +30% as advanced nodes and packaging define AI supply

detail.zh: TSMC 官方月度收入显示 Jan-May 2026 合计 NT$1.962T（+30.0%），May 收入 NT$416.975B（+30.1%）。结合 2026Q1 $35.90B 收入、66.2% 毛利率、HPC/先进节点高占比和 $52-56B capex，foundry 层仍是 AI accelerator 供给的核心公共约束。该信号用于交叉校验 NVDA/AVGO/AMD/MRVL 设计端收入与 CoWoS/N3/N2 产能是否一致。
detail.en: TSMC's official monthly revenue shows Jan-May 2026 revenue of NT$1.962T (+30.0%) and May revenue of NT$416.975B (+30.1%). Together with 2026Q1 revenue of $35.90B, 66.2% gross margin, high HPC / advanced-node mix, and $52-56B capex, the foundry layer remains the common constraint for AI accelerator supply. This signal cross-checks whether NVDA / AVGO / AMD / MRVL design-side revenue aligns with CoWoS / N3 / N2 capacity.

title.zh: Micron Q3 收入 $41.46B，HBM/DRAM/NAND 共同验证 memory 瓶颈
title.en: Micron Q3 revenue $41.46B as HBM, DRAM, and NAND validate the memory bottleneck

detail.zh: Micron FY2026 Q3 收入 $41.46B、毛利率约 84.6%，Q4 指引收入 $49-51B；公开报道显示 HBM 产能售罄至 2026，16 个 SCA 中 14 个最低合同收入约 $100B，6 月 DRAM/NAND 价格仍上涨。该信号用于检验 AI 需求是否真正穿透到 memory bit/带宽/价格，同时监控周期顶点和估值压缩风险。
detail.en: Micron FY2026 Q3 revenue was $41.46B with about 84.6% gross margin, and Q4 guidance is $49-51B. Public reports indicate HBM capacity is sold out through 2026, 14 of 16 SCAs carry about $100B of minimum contract revenue, and June DRAM / NAND prices were still rising. This signal tests whether AI demand is truly reaching memory bits, bandwidth, and pricing while monitoring cycle-peak and valuation-compression risk.

title.zh: PJM 提前数据中心容量采购，CEG/VST/NRG 电力约束进入市场机制
title.en: PJM accelerates data-center capacity procurement as CEG/VST/NRG move the power constraint into market mechanisms

detail.zh: PJM 将数据中心容量采购提前至 2026-09，CEG/VST/NRG 等电力股随之反应；同时 CEG 通过 Microsoft/Crane restart、Meta 约 1.1GW 核电 PPA 和 Calpine 可调度容量验证长期电力合同化，VST 通过 Meta 核电协议与 Cogentrix 约 5,500MW 燃气容量（约 $4B net purchase price，seller-side 公开报道约 $4.7B total consideration）验证可调度容量价值，NRG 则通过 LS Power 后约 25GW 平台、CPower C&I VPP 和 retail/Vivint 组合验证 AI 负荷是否传导到 merchant/retail power。这个信号测试 AI 电力需求能否从叙事转换为容量价格、PPA/large-load contracts 和现有发电资产重定价。
detail.en: PJM moved data-center capacity procurement up to Sep 2026 and power equities such as CEG/VST/NRG reacted. CEG tests long-term power contracting through Microsoft/Crane restart, Meta's about 1.1GW nuclear PPA, and Calpine dispatchable capacity; VST tests dispatchable-capacity value through Meta nuclear PPAs and the roughly 5,500MW Cogentrix gas-capacity acquisition (about $4B net purchase price, with public seller-side reporting near $4.7B total consideration); and NRG tests whether AI load reaches merchant/retail power through its post-LS-Power about 25GW platform, CPower C&I VPP and retail/Vivint mix. The signal tests whether AI power demand converts from narrative into capacity prices, PPAs / large-load contracts and repricing of existing generation assets.

title.zh: Oracle RPO 升至 $638B，AI capex 与融资压力同步上升
title.en: Oracle RPO rises to $638B as AI capex and financing pressure rise

detail.zh: Oracle FY2026 Q4 RPO 达 $638B（约 +363%，环比 +$85B），OCI 收入 $5.8B（约 +93%），强化 AI 云需求读数；但 FY2026 capex $55.66B、FCF -$23.69B，FY2027 capex 指引 $90-95B，且公司计划约 $40B 债务+股权融资。该信号用于校验 backlog 是否能转化为高回报现金流，而不是简单把大订单当作无风险需求。
detail.en: Oracle FY2026 Q4 RPO reached $638B (about +363%, +$85B sequentially), and OCI revenue was $5.8B (about +93%), strengthening the AI-cloud demand readout. But FY2026 capex was $55.66B, FCF was -$23.69B, FY2027 capex is guided at $90-95B, and the company expects roughly $40B of debt and equity financing. This signal tests whether backlog converts into high-return cash flow rather than treating large orders as risk-free demand.

title.zh: Marvell 上修 FY2027/FY2028 展望，custom ASIC 与光互连进入架构校验位
title.en: Marvell raises FY2027/FY2028 outlook as custom ASIC and optical interconnect enter the architecture check

detail.zh: 公开报道显示 Marvell 将 FY2027/FY2028 收入展望上修至约 $11.5B/$16.5B，数据中心收入约 $1.83B，且 NVIDIA $2B 投资与 NVLink Fusion 合作、Celestial AI 光互连收购共同强化其 AI custom silicon/optical 路线。该信号用于交叉校验 Broadcom 自定义 XPU 叙事是否扩散到更多供应商，以及 optical interconnect 是否成为 AI 集群新瓶颈。
detail.en: Public reports indicate Marvell raised FY2027 / FY2028 revenue outlook to about $11.5B / $16.5B, with data-center revenue around $1.83B. NVIDIA's $2B investment plus NVLink Fusion and the Celestial AI optical-interconnect acquisition strengthen its AI custom silicon / optical path. This signal cross-checks whether Broadcom's custom XPU narrative is spreading to more suppliers and whether optical interconnect is becoming a new AI-cluster bottleneck.

title.zh: NVIDIA 投资 Coherent，AI 光连接从模块叙事进入产能锁定
title.en: NVIDIA invests in Coherent as AI optical connectivity moves from module narrative to capacity lock-up

detail.zh: NVIDIA 宣布向 Coherent 投资 $2B，并包含多年、数十亿美元采购承诺和未来先进激光/光网络产能访问权；Coherent Q3 FY2026 Datacenter & Communications 收入约 $1.362B，占 pro forma 收入约 75%。这个信号把 AAOI/GLW 的 optical 需求、ANET 的开放以太网架构和 NVDA 的下一代 AI factory 光互连路线连接起来：如果收入、产能和 FCF 同步兑现，光连接是实约束；如果只有估值先行，则需警惕 AI optics 过度定价。
detail.en: NVIDIA announced a $2B investment in Coherent with a multi-year, multi-billion-dollar purchase commitment and future access to advanced laser/optical-networking capacity. Coherent's Q3 FY2026 Datacenter & Communications revenue was about $1.362B, roughly 75% of pro forma revenue. This signal links AAOI/GLW optical demand, ANET's open-Ethernet architecture check and NVDA's next-generation AI-factory optical-interconnect roadmap: if revenue, capacity and FCF validate together, optics is a real constraint; if valuation moves first, AI optics may be overpricing the cycle.

title.zh: DLR/EQIX 租约、backlog 与互联指标验证 AI 数据中心落地需求
title.en: DLR/EQIX leasing, backlog and interconnection metrics validate AI data-center deployment demand

detail.zh: DLR Q1 2026 签下 $707M 年化 GAAP base rent bookings（100% share）和 $1.8B signed-but-not-commenced backlog，0-1MW + interconnection bookings 达 $98M、同比 +42%，并披露约 9GW 总 IT capacity；EQIX Q1 2026 则披露 revenue $2.444B、interconnection revenue $446M、AFFO/share $10.79、MRR +12% reported、annualized gross bookings $378M，且 largest deals 约 60% AI-related。这个信号用于交叉验证：芯片/neocloud 的需求是否真的落到租约、互联、零售托管、xScale 和开发容量；如果 backlog commence、power/capex 或 MRR/cabinet yield 变弱，则上游订单可能领先真实部署太多。
detail.en: DLR signed $707M of annualized GAAP base-rent bookings at 100% share and ended Q1 2026 with $1.8B of signed-but-not-commenced backlog. 0-1MW plus interconnection bookings reached $98M, +42% YoY, and total IT capacity was about 9GW. EQIX Q1 2026 added a second facility readout: revenue $2.444B, interconnection revenue $446M, AFFO/share $10.79, MRR +12% reported, annualized gross bookings $378M, and about 60% of largest deals AI-related. This signal cross-checks whether chip/neocloud demand is landing in leases, interconnection, retail colocation, xScale and development capacity; if backlog commencement, power/capex or MRR/cabinet yield weakens, upstream orders may be running too far ahead of physical deployment.
